name: equip_best_armor
description: Equip the best available armor pieces from inventory into their appropriate armor slots for improved damage reduction.
parameters: z.object({ allowLeather: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether leather armor should be considered when choosing armor pieces"), replaceWeaker: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to replace currently worn armor when an inventory piece has a higher protection score") })

name: flank_and_attack_hostile
description: Move to a safe flank position around the specified hostile to avoid allied friendly fire, then attack it with the equipped melee weapon while maintaining spacing from nearby allies.
parameters: z.object({ targetEntityId: z.union([z.number().int(), z.string().min(1)]).describe("Hostile entity id to flank and attack using current live bot.entities"), allyAvoidRadiusBlocks: z.number().min(0.5).max(8).default(2).describe("Minimum spacing in blocks to maintain from allied players while moving and attacking"), preferredFlank: z.enum(["any", "east", "west", "north", "south", "east_or_south", "west_or_north"]).default("any").describe("Preferred side of the hostile to stand on, using world directions relative to the hostile"), attackRangeBlocks: z.number().min(1.5).max(4).default(3).describe("Maximum melee attack distance in blocks before repositioning closer"), maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(500).max(60000).default(5000).describe("Maximum active unfrozen milliseconds to keep flanking and attacking before stopping"), maxChaseDistanceBlocks: z.number().min(4).max(64).default(16).describe("Maximum distance in blocks from the bot to the hostile before refusing or abandoning the chase"), minimumHealth: z.number().min(1).max(20).default(4).describe("Abort when bot health is at or below this value"), meleeItemName: z.string().default("").describe("Optional inventory melee item name to use; leave empty to choose the best available sword, axe, trident, or mace") })
code: const targetEntityId = String(args.targetEntityId); const pollMs = 100; const movePollMs = 150; const attackCooldownMs = 650; const hostileNames = new Set(['zombie', 'skeleton', 'husk', 'drowned', 'stray', 'spider', 'cave_spider', 'creeper', 'pillager', 'vindicator', 'witch', 'slime', 'magma_cube', 'phantom', 'silverfish', 'enderman', 'warden', 'baby_zombie']); const normalizeItemName = function (value) { return String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase().replace(/^minecraft:/, '').replace(/\s+/g, '_'); }; const requestedWeaponName = normalizeItemName(args.meleeItemName); const isHostileEntity = function (entity) { if (!entity || !entity.position || entity.isValid === false) { return false; } const name = String(entity.name || '').toLowerCase(); return entity.kind === 'Hostile mobs' || entity.type === 'hostile' || hostileNames.has(name); }; const findTarget = function () { return Object.values(bot.entities).find(function (entity) { return entity && String(entity.id) === targetEntityId && isHostileEntity(entity); }); }; const meleeScore = function (item) { const name = normalizeItemName(item && item.name); if (!name) { return -1; } if (name.indexOf('netherite_sword') >= 0) { return 100; } if (name.indexOf('diamond_sword') >= 0) { return 90; } if (name.indexOf('iron_sword') >= 0) { return 80; } if (name.indexOf('stone_sword') >= 0) { return 70; } if (name.indexOf('golden_sword') >= 0) { return 60; } if (name.indexOf('wooden_sword') >= 0) { return 50; } if (name === 'mace') { return 85; } if (name === 'trident') { return 75; } if (/_axe$/.test(name)) { return 55; } return -1; }; const itemMatchesRequested = function (item) { if (!requestedWeaponName) { return false; } return normalizeItemName(item.name) === requestedWeaponName || normalizeItemName(item.displayName) === requestedWeaponName; }; const findMeleeItem = function () { const held = bot.heldItem; if (held && (requestedWeaponName ? itemMatchesRequested(held) : meleeScore(held) >= 0)) { return held; } const items = bot.inventory.items(); if (requestedWeaponName) { return items.find(function (item) { return itemMatchesRequested(item); }); } let best = null; let bestScore = -1; for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i += 1) { const score = meleeScore(items[i]); if (score > bestScore) { best = items[i]; bestScore = score; } } return bestScore >= 0 ? best : null; }; const distanceXZ = function (a, b) { const dx = a.x - b.x; const dz = a.z - b.z; return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz); }; const pointSegmentDistanceXZ = function (point, a, b) { const abx = b.x - a.x; const abz = b.z - a.z; const apx = point.x - a.x; const apz = point.z - a.z; const denom = abx * abx + abz * abz; let t = denom > 0 ? (apx * abx + apz * abz) / denom : 0; if (t < 0) { t = 0; } if (t > 1) { t = 1; } const cx = a.x + abx * t; const cz = a.z + abz * t; const dx = point.x - cx; const dz = point.z - cz; return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz); }; const getAllies = function () { const seen = new Set(); const allies = []; Object.keys(bot.players || {}).forEach(function (name) { const player = bot.players[name]; const entity = player && player.entity; if (entity && entity !== bot.entity && entity.position && entity.isValid !== false && !seen.has(entity.id)) { seen.add(entity.id); allies.push(entity); } }); Object.values(bot.entities).forEach(function (entity) { if (entity && entity !== bot.entity && entity.position && entity.isValid !== false && !seen.has(entity.id) && (entity.type === 'player' || entity.username)) { seen.add(entity.id); allies.push(entity); } }); return allies; }; const nearestAllyDistance = function (position, allies) { let best = Infinity; for (let i = 0; i < allies.length; i += 1) { const d = distanceXZ(position, allies[i].position); if (d < best) { best = d; } } return best; }; const attackLineClear = function (fromPosition, targetPosition, allies) { const threshold = Math.max(0.9, Math.min(1.4, args.allyAvoidRadiusBlocks * 0.7)); for (let i = 0; i < allies.length; i += 1) { if (pointSegmentDistanceXZ(allies[i].position, fromPosition, targetPosition) < threshold) { return false; } } return true; }; const preferredNames = function () { if (args.preferredFlank === 'east_or_south') { return new Set(['east', 'south', 'southeast']); } if (args.preferredFlank === 'west_or_north') { return new Set(['west', 'north', 'northwest']); } if (args.preferredFlank === 'east') { return new Set(['east', 'northeast', 'southeast']); } if (args.preferredFlank === 'west') { return new Set(['west', 'northwest', 'southwest']); } if (args.preferredFlank === 'north') { return new Set(['north', 'northeast', 'northwest']); } if (args.preferredFlank === 'south') { return new Set(['south', 'southeast', 'southwest']); } return new Set(); }; const chooseFlank = function (target, allies) { const standDistance = Math.max(1.4, Math.min(2.6, args.attackRangeBlocks - 0.2)); const dirs = [{ name: 'east', x: 1, z: 0 }, { name: 'south', x: 0, z: 1 }, { name: 'west', x: -1, z: 0 }, { name: 'north', x: 0, z: -1 }, { name: 'southeast', x: 0.707, z: 0.707 }, { name: 'southwest', x: -0.707, z: 0.707 }, { name: 'northeast', x: 0.707, z: -0.707 }, { name: 'northwest', x: -0.707, z: -0.707 }]; const preferred = preferredNames(); let best = null; let bestScore = -Infinity; for (let i = 0; i < dirs.length; i += 1) { const dir = dirs[i]; const candidate = { x: target.position.x + dir.x * standDistance, y: Math.floor(target.position.y), z: target.position.z + dir.z * standDistance, name: dir.name }; const allyDistance = nearestAllyDistance(candidate, allies); if (allyDistance < args.allyAvoidRadiusBlocks) { continue; } if (!attackLineClear(candidate, target.position, allies)) { continue; } let score = 0; if (preferred.has(dir.name)) { score += 100; } score += Math.min(allyDistance, 10) * 4; score -= distanceXZ(bot.entity.position, candidate) * 0.6; if (score > bestScore) { best = candidate; bestScore = score; } } return best; }; if (!bot.entity || bot.health <= 0) { return '<UNSAFE>: Cannot flank attack because the bot is not alive.'; } if (bot.health <= args.minimumHealth) { return '<UNSAFE>: Health is too low to safely engage in melee.'; } const initialTarget = findTarget(); if (!initialTarget) { return '<NO TARGET>: Could not find hostile entity ' + targetEntityId + '.'; } if (bot.entity.position.distanceTo(initialTarget.position) > args.maxChaseDistanceBlocks) { return '<NO TARGET>: Hostile entity ' + targetEntityId + ' is beyond the maximum chase distance.'; } const initialWeapon = findMeleeItem(); if (!initialWeapon) { return '<NO ITEM>: Could not find a usable melee weapon.'; } startBackgroundSkill(bot, 'flank_and_attack_hostile', async function (token) { let pathfinderUsed = false; try { const movements = new Movements(bot); movements.canDig = false; bot.pathfinder.setMovements(movements); pathfinderUsed = true; let elapsedActiveMs = 0; while (canContinueBotAction(bot, token) && elapsedActiveMs < args.maxDurationMs) { if (bot.health <= args.minimumHealth) { return; } const target = findTarget(); if (!target) { return; } if (typeof target.health === 'number' && target.health <= 0) { return; } if (bot.entity.position.distanceTo(target.position) > args.maxChaseDistanceBlocks) { return; } const weapon = findMeleeItem(); if (!weapon) { return; } if (!bot.heldItem || normalizeItemName(bot.heldItem.name) !== normalizeItemName(weapon.name)) { if (!await waitUntilWorldActive(bot, token, pollMs)) { return; } try { await bot.equip(weapon, 'hand'); } catch (err) { return; } } const allies = getAllies(); const flank = chooseFlank(target, allies); if (!flank) { return; } const botPos = bot.entity.position; const targetDistance = botPos.distanceTo(target.position); const allyDistance = nearestAllyDistance(botPos, allies); const lineClear = attackLineClear(botPos, target.position, allies); const atFlank = distanceXZ(botPos, flank) <= 1.0; if (!atFlank || targetDistance > args.attackRangeBlocks || allyDistance < args.allyAvoidRadiusBlocks || !lineClear) { if (!await waitUntilWorldActive(bot, token, pollMs)) { return; } bot.pathfinder.setGoal(new goals.GoalNear(flank.x, flank.y, flank.z, 1), false); if (!await waitForActiveMs(bot, token, movePollMs, pollMs)) { return; } elapsedActiveMs += movePollMs; continue; } bot.pathfinder.setGoal(null); if (!await waitUntilWorldActive(bot, token, pollMs)) { return; } try { await bot.lookAt(target.position.offset(0, Math.max(0.7, (target.height || 1.8) * 0.6), 0), true); } catch (err) {} const refreshedAllies = getAllies(); if (bot.entity.position.distanceTo(target.position) <= args.attackRangeBlocks + 0.3 && nearestAllyDistance(bot.entity.position, refreshedAllies) >= args.allyAvoidRadiusBlocks && attackLineClear(bot.entity.position, target.position, refreshedAllies)) { try { bot.attack(target); } catch (err) {} } if (!await waitForActiveMs(bot, token, attackCooldownMs, pollMs)) { return; } elapsedActiveMs += attackCooldownMs; } } finally { if (pathfinderUsed && bot.pathfinder) { try { bot.pathfinder.setGoal(null); } catch (err) {} try { bot.pathfinder.stop(); } catch (err) {} } try { bot.clearControlStates(); } catch (err) {} } }); return '<STARTED>: Flanking melee attack started on hostile ' + targetEntityId + ' while avoiding allies within ' + args.allyAvoidRadiusBlocks + ' blocks.';

name: attack_nearest_hostile
description: Equip the best melee weapon available, face the nearest hostile mob, and attack it until it dies or until health drops below a safe threshold, using short strafes to maintain spacing and avoid surrounding allies.
parameters: z.object({ safeHealth: z.number().min(1).max(20).default(8).describe("Minimum bot health points required; the action stops when health is at or below this value"), maxDurationTicks: z.number().int().min(1).max(1200).default(120).describe("Maximum active game ticks to spend attacking; 20 ticks is about one active second"), preferWeapon: z.string().min(1).default("stone_sword").describe("Preferred melee weapon item name to use if present before falling back to the best available melee weapon"), avoidFriendlyFire: z.boolean().default(true).describe("When true, skip swings while a visible player is close to the target or in the melee line"), searchRadiusBlocks: z.number().min(1).max(64).default(16).describe("Maximum distance in blocks from the bot to choose the initial nearest hostile"), engageRangeBlocks: z.number().min(1.5).max(6).default(3.2).describe("Distance in blocks where the bot stops pathing and begins strafing and melee attacks"), minSpacingBlocks: z.number().min(0.5).max(4).default(1.8).describe("Preferred minimum spacing in blocks; the bot backs up briefly when closer than this"), allyAvoidRadiusBlocks: z.number().min(0.5).max(5).default(1.7).describe("Player distance in blocks around the target or attack line that is treated as friendly-fire risk") })

name: kite_nearest_hostile
description: Retreat directly away from the nearest hostile mob while facing it, maintaining a preferred distance, sprinting if possible, avoiding other hostiles and allied players, and stopping early if a safe gap is reached or health becomes critically low.
parameters: z.object({ preferredDistanceBlocks: z.number().min(2).max(32).default(7).describe("Stop kiting once the nearest hostile is at least this many blocks away"), retreatBlocks: z.number().min(1).max(32).default(8).describe("How many blocks to try to move away from the current nearest hostile each retreat step"), maxDurationTicks: z.number().int().min(1).max(1200).default(100).describe("Maximum active Minecraft ticks to kite before stopping; 20 ticks is about one second"), minimumHealth: z.number().min(0).max(20).default(3).describe("Stop immediately or do not start if bot health is at or below this many health points"), avoidPlayers: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to bias the retreat direction away from visible allied players"), hostileSearchRadiusBlocks: z.number().min(3).max(64).default(24).describe("Maximum radius in blocks for finding hostiles to kite and avoid"), playerAvoidRadiusBlocks: z.number().min(1).max(12).default(3).describe("Radius in blocks around allied players to avoid when avoidPlayers is true") })

name: eat_food_if_hungry_or_hurt
description: If food can be eaten and the bot is hurt or hunger is below full, equip the best available food and eat once to restore hunger/saturation for healing; otherwise do nothing.
parameters: z.object({ minHealth: z.number().min(0).max(20).default(18).describe("Eat when current health points are below this threshold; Minecraft player health is 0 to 20"), minFood: z.number().int().min(0).max(20).default(20).describe("Eat when current food level is below this threshold; Minecraft food level is 0 to 20"), preferredFood: z.string().min(1).default("bread").describe("Food item name to choose first when available, for example bread or cooked_beef"), allowRiskyFoods: z.boolean().default(false).describe("Allow foods with likely negative or disruptive effects, such as rotten_flesh, spider_eye, pufferfish, raw_chicken, suspicious_stew, or chorus_fruit"), consumeDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1200).max(3000).default(1850).describe("Active unfrozen milliseconds to hold use-item while eating once"), restorePreviousHandItem: z.boolean().default(true).describe("After eating completes naturally, try to re-equip the item that was in hand before eating") })
